# programs.poetry

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.poetry`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.poetry.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable poetry. |
| `programs.poetry.package` | `null or package` | The poetry package to use. May be used to install custom poetry plugins. |
| `programs.poetry.settings` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/pypoetry/config.toml on Linux or $HOME/Library/Application Support/pypoetry/config.toml on Darwin. See https://python-poetry.org/docs/configuration/ for more information. |
